CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2021 Continued To Jun-16-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Dismiss His Individual Claims With Prejudice And Class Claims Without Prejudice
Off Calendar May-04-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF DIMAS SANDOVAL'S Motion To Dismiss His Individual Claims With Prejudice And Class Claims Without Prejudice.

No appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Plaintiff's motion to dismiss individual claims with prejudice and class claims without prejudice is granted. (Cal. R. Ct. 3.770.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
